# Csv Soc

## Overview

csv_soc ‚Äî SOC-flavoured operations over a stored CSV file.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `csv_soc` | SOC operations over CSV: CIDR filtering, IP classification, IOC extraction, and offline GeoIP enrichment. | `core:csv_soc` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

_No configuration-derived environment variables._

## Operations

### `csv_soc`

- **`ip_in_cidr`** ‚Äî filter rows by CIDR membership.

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `column` | `string` | ‚Äî | IP column name. Required for ip_in_cidr, ip_classify, and geoip_enrich. |
  | `cidrs` | `array` | ‚Äî | CIDR ranges (e.g. '10.0.0.0/8', '2001:db8::/32'). Required for ip_in_cidr. |
  | `invert` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | When true, return rows that do NOT match any CIDR. Used by ip_in_cidr only. Default false. |

- **`ip_classify`** ‚Äî tag each IP as public/private/loopback/...

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `column` | `string` | ‚Äî | IP column name. Required for ip_in_cidr, ip_classify, and geoip_enrich. |
  | `output_column` | `string` | ‚Äî | Name of the column to add for ip_classify (default 'ip_class'). |

- **`extract_iocs`** ‚Äî scan text columns for IPs/domains/URLs/emails/MD5/SHA1/SHA256.

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `columns` | `array` | ‚Äî | Text columns to scan. Required for extract_iocs. |

- **`geoip_enrich`** ‚Äî append ASN + (when available) country.

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `column` | `string` | ‚Äî | IP column name. Required for ip_in_cidr, ip_classify, and geoip_enrich. |
